scripts.build: node -e "console.log('🧹 Cleaning old builds...'); try{require('fs').unlinkSync('./frontend/package-lock.json')}catch(e){}; try{require('fs').rmSync('./backend/public',{recursive:true,force:true})}catch(e){}; try{require('fs').rmSync('./frontend/dist',{recursive:true,force:true})}catch(e){}; console.log('Building frontend...')" && cd frontend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && cd backend && npm install && cd .. && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function cp(a,b){console.log('📦 Copying files to backend/public...');if(!fs.existsSync(b))fs.mkdirSync(b,{recursive:true});fs.readdirSync(a).forEach(c=>{const d=path.join(a,c),e=path.join(b,c);fs.statSync(d).isDirectory()?cp(d,e):fs.copyFileSync(d,e)})}cp('frontend/dist','backend/public');console.log('✅ Build complete!')"
